heading: Platt National Park designation repealed; incorporation of areas into Chickasaw National Recreation Area
label: 460hh–4 Platt National Park designation repealed; incorporation of areas into Chickasaw National Recreation Area
text: The Act of (), which directed that certain lands now included by this subchapter in the recreation area be designated as the Platt National Park, is hereby repealed, and such lands shall hereafter be considered and known as an integral part of the Chickasaw National Recreation Area: , That within such area the Secretary may cause to be erected suitable markers or plaques to honor the memory of Orville Hitchcock Platt and to commemorate the original establishment of Platt National Park.June 29, 190634 Stat. 837Provided
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, is act , No. 42, , which was classified to sections 151, 152, and 153 of this title, and was repealed by , , .June 29, 1906June 29, 1906Mar. 17, 197634 Stat. 837Pub. L. 94–235, § 590 Stat. 236
